summary: Bulk delete BIM Model Revision Viewpoints
description: Delete multiple BIM Model Revision Viewpoint associations in a single request.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Array of BIM Model Revision Viewpoint IDs to delete

200.description: BIM Model Revision Viewpoints bulk delete completed

deleted_ids.description: Array of successfully deleted viewpoint IDs

errors.description: Array of error messages for failed deletions

413.description: Payload Too Large - batch size exceeds maximum limit
